title: Complaints made against the Polynesian Cultural Center

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Hawaii Uniform Information Practices Act, I hereby request the following records:

1. All complaints made against the Polynesian Cultural Center in Laie, Hawaii, from January 2020 to March 2026.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Madison Kitch

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

From January 2022 to December 2025 stating all incidents involving K9 deployment that resulted in physical contact with the suspect. If such request is able to be provided, please include the date, time, and location of each incident.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Ricky Padilla

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Records of ShotSpotter device being alerted and activated from Jan 1 2022 to Dec 31 2025. Additionally, I request to disclose the corresponding outcomes of ShotSpotter being activated (confirmed shooting vs. no evidence found).

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

title: Request for Court Records and Business Licsenses for Griffin Brown (Reno Police Department)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

1. All court records for Griffin Brown between 2011 and 2026 in the state of Nevada. 
2. All current business licenses held by Griffin Brown in Washoe County between 2011 and 2026.
3. All canceled or former business licenses previously held by Griffin Brown in Washoe County between 2011 and 2026.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Madison Kitch

title: Incarcerated Firefighter Program Records (Department of Forestry & Fire Protection (CAL FIRE))

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Records from January 2020 to December 2025 of digital presentations, instructional guides, and curriculum outlines to incarcerated firefighter participants that is able to be unredacted for public use.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Ricky Padilla

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All records from January 1st, 2023 to December 31st, 2024 regarding settlements for claims or lawsuits alleging police misconduct by the City of Reno Police Department. Please be sure to include settlement agreements, complaint summaries, amounts paid, and any related investigative findings.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Ricky Padilla

communications.subject: Nevada Public Records Act Request: Arrest Reports
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All arrests and citations conducted by University Police Department within the time frame of January 1, 2022 to December 31, 2022.

Please include:

Offense type
Location of incident
Disposition

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Ricky Padilla
